sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15589" key="a)rta/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτάρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n15589.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">felt shoes,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρτήρ.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
